title: Sortie Session
description: The canonical shape of a single training Session as emitted by the engine or Claude Code. Must match framework/CONTEXT.md terminology exactly. The Session is what the user logs at the end of the day; the log extension adds an `actuals` payload to each main-work block.

warmup.description: Ordered warm-up blocks. Rehab work for active niggles is woven in here when relevant.

main.description: Ordered main-work blocks. For weights sessions this is spine + accessories; for cardio it is the intervals/steady block.

cooldown.description: Ordered cooldown blocks (mobility, breathing, optional rehab).

rationale.description: One-line plain-English explanation for why this Session was chosen today (modality balance, event taper, readiness, etc.).

date.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) the Session is prescribed for.

modality.description: Modality (per CONTEXT.md). Exactly one per Session.

sessionType.description: The template slot, e.g. upper-push, upper-pull, lower, full-body, conditioning, steady, intervals, threshold, easy, long.

duration.description: Total session duration in minutes (warm-up + main + cooldown).

equipmentProfile.description: Equipment profile key the Session was generated against (e.g. Home, Military, or an ad-hoc label).

readiness.description: Readiness score (1–5) derived from today's Check-in. Scales volume/intensity.

eventOverlay.description: Name of the active Event overlay biasing this Session, or null.

exercise.description: Name of an exercise that exists in framework/exercise-library.json.

sets.description: Number of working sets (omit for steady cardio).

reps.description: Reps per set. Integer for fixed reps; string for ranges or AMRAP (e.g. "5-8", "AMRAP").

duration.description: Duration for time-based work (e.g. "30 min", "4x4 min", "500 m").

load.description: Working load in kg for weights, or a descriptor (e.g. "bodyweight", "RPE 7", "Zone 2").

cue.description: One-line execution cue copied from the exercise library or contextualised.

rehab.description: True if this block was woven in because a Rehab protocol is active.
